sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Why Is Northwest Pipe (NWPX) Stock Soaring Today
feed.summary: Shares of Northwest Pipe (NWPX) surged 10.9% after the company reported strong first-quarter 2026 financial results, significantly beating Wall Street expectations for both revenue and earnings. Sales grew 19.1% year-over-year to $138.3 million, and earnings per share rose to $1.08, surpassing consensus forecasts. The positive performance also led to a new 52-week high for the stock.

feed.title: Offerpad (NYSE: OPAD) may sell $69,738,969 in Class A shares via Jefferies
feed.summary: Offerpad Solutions Inc. (NYSE: OPAD) has filed a prospectus supplement to sell up to $69,738,969 in Class A common stock through Jefferies LLC under an existing Open Market Sales Agreement. This agreement, dated August 28, 2025, allows Offerpad to offer and sell these shares from time to time. The company also filed a legal opinion from Latham & Watkins LLP regarding the validity of the issuance and sale of these shares.

feed.title: U.S. ETF Express | Defiance Daily Target 2x Long OKLO ETF Was the Top Gainer, Rising 23.09%
feed.summary: This report highlights the top-performing ETFs in the U.S. market, with the Defiance Daily Target 2x Long OKLO ETF leading the gains, increasing by 23.09%. Other significant gainers included the AXS 2X Innovation ETF and the NightShares 2000 ETF, while inverse ETFs generally saw declines. The data reflects performance up to April 30, 2026.

feed.title: Universal Display Corporation Announces $400 Million Share Repurchase Authorization and Quarterly Cash Dividend of $0.50 per Share
feed.summary: Universal Display Corporation (NASDAQ: OLED) has announced a new $400 million share repurchase authorization, building on a fully utilized previous program. The company also declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.50 per share payable on June 30, 2026, to shareholders of record on June 16, 2026. These actions underscore the company's commitment to returning capital to shareholders, supported by its strong free cash flow and confidence in the long-term growth of OLED technology.

feed.title: Vanguard Capital Management holds 5.27% of Owens Corning (NYSE: OC)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has reported a 5.27% beneficial ownership stake in Owens Corning (NYSE: OC), holding 4,243,450 shares of common stock as of March 31, 2026. This disclosure was made via a Schedule 13G SEC filing, indicating a passive investment. Vanguard possesses sole voting power over 625,422 shares and sole dispositive power over all 4,243,450 shares, with the filing noting the ownership is held in the ordinary course of business without intent to influence control.

feed.title: OPCH - Option Care Health Inc Stock Price and Quote
feed.summary: Option Care Health Inc. (OPCH) saw its stock close down significantly after cutting its 2026 revenue outlook due to a larger Stelara reset, despite maintaining its EBITDA/EPS guidance. The article provides comprehensive financial data, analyst ratings history, and recent news headlines related to the company's performance, including insider transactions.

feed.title: OG&E to power three new Google data centers in Oklahoma
feed.summary: OG&E has announced an agreement to power three new Google data centers in Muskogee and Stillwater, Oklahoma. This landmark deal requires Google to cover 100% of connection costs, contracted energy costs, and contribute to power generation, including capacity from two solar facilities. This arrangement is set to protect existing OG&E customers from increased costs, establishing a new model for data center partnerships.

feed.title: OGE Energy Corp. Reports Q1 2026 Earnings of $0.24 Per Share, Eyes Growth with Google and New Capacity
feed.summary: OGE Energy Corp. reported Q1 2026 earnings of $0.24 per share and remains confident in its financial outlook. The company is strategically partnering with Google to power its data centers in Oklahoma, with Google covering connection costs and fair share for power. OGE is also expanding its generation capacity with new power plants and energy storage projects, while actively engaged in regulatory processes for future growth.

feed.title: NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc. Dividends – DUS:5O4
feed.summary: NexPoint Residential Trust, Inc. (DUS:5O4) pays quarterly dividends, with the next expected to be 0.45 EUR. Investors need to buy shares before June 15 to be eligible for this payment. The current trailing twelve-month dividend yield is 7.36%.

feed.title: NAPCO Security Technologies Adds Four Regional Sales Managers
feed.summary: NAPCO Security Technologies has appointed four new regional sales managers to reinforce its commitment to expanding market presence and supporting partners and customers in intrusion, commercial fire, and access control. Edwin Paiz, Jason Summers, Clayton Shelander, and Curtis Boardman will cover Florida, the Southeast, Mid-Central, and Northeast territories respectively. These strategic hires aim to strengthen relationships and accelerate growth in these key regions.

feed.title: OFS Capital (NASDAQ: OFS) posts Q1 2026 loss as NAV and yields drop
feed.summary: OFS Capital (NASDAQ: OFS) reported a net loss for Q1 2026, with net investment income at $0.18 per share and a significant decrease in net asset value (NAV) from $9.19 to $8.16 per share. This decline was largely driven by $13.9 million in net investment losses and a reduction in the weighted-average performing income yield. The company declared a Q2 2026 distribution of $0.17 per share and refinanced its credit facilities.

feed.title: Navitas Semiconductor (NVTS) director receives 4,839-share RSU equity grant
feed.summary: Navitas Semiconductor director Gregory Michael Fischer was granted 4,839 Restricted Stock Units (RSUs) on April 28, 2026, as reported in a Form 4 SEC filing. These RSUs are a compensation-related equity award and are scheduled to vest in full on June 9, 2026, at which point they will convert into shares of Class A Common Stock. After this grant, Fischer directly holds 4,839 shares, though some may be sold or withheld upon vesting to cover taxes.

feed.title: Nano Dimension Divests Key Product Lines Amid Strategic Review
feed.summary: Nano Dimension (NNDM) is undergoing a strategic alternatives review with financial advisers to maximize shareholder value, exploring options like mergers and asset monetization. As an initial step, the company announced the sale of its additively manufactured electronics and Fabrica product lines to Inspira Technologies OXY B.H.N. Ltd. TipRanks' AI Analyst, Spark, rates NNDM as Neutral due to weak financial performance and bearish technicals, despite constructive 2026 growth and margin guidance.

feed.title: Nano Dimension (NASDAQ: NNDM) details strategic review, AME sale
feed.summary: Nano Dimension is undergoing a strategic review with the help of Guggenheim Securities and Houlihan Lokey to maximize shareholder value. The company is exploring options like strategic mergers, reverse mergers, and other transactions, and has already sold its additively manufactured electronics (AME) and Fabrica product lines to Inspira Technologies. Nano Dimension plans to provide further updates to investors as the review progresses.

feed.title: NOAH (NOAH) CFO converts restricted stock units into 1,035 ordinary shares
feed.summary: NOAH HOLDINGS LTD's CFO, Pan Qing, converted 103 restricted stock units into 1,035 ordinary shares on April 29, 2026, a routine equity compensation event. This transaction is part of a larger RSU award set to fully vest by June 29, 2026, and results in Pan Qing directly holding 926,390 ordinary shares and 208 restricted stock units. Each RSU converts into ten ordinary shares, demonstrating the company's long-term incentive structure.

feed.title: Blue Owl sold about half its SpaceX holding at $1.25 trillion valuation, co-CEO says
feed.summary: Alternative asset manager Blue Owl has sold about half its investment in SpaceX at a $1.25 trillion valuation, according to co-CEO Marc Lipschultz. The firm made approximately 10 times its initial investment and still holds the other half, with SpaceX expected to go public this year at a potential $1.75 trillion valuation. Blue Owl's funds, including Blue Owl Technology Finance Corp and Blue Owl Capital Corp, had significant holdings in SpaceX, which Lipschultz described as their only equity investment in the aerospace sector.

feed.title: Earnings Flash (NUTX) Nutex Health Inc. Reports Q1 Revenue $216.5M, vs. FactSet Est of $227.8M
feed.summary: Nutex Health Inc. (NUTX) reported its first-quarter revenue of $216.5 million, falling short of the FactSet estimate of $227.8 million. This financial update follows another recent report from "MT Newswires" on the same day, indicating that the company posted Q1 EPS of $6.52, surpassing the FactSet estimate of $3.99. The articles are reserved for members to view the full content.

feed.title: Nutex Health's Valuation Upgrade Reflects Strong Financial Performance and Growth Potential
feed.summary: Nutex Health, a small-cap company in the Pharmaceuticals & Biotechnology sector, has seen its valuation grade upgraded from fair to attractive due to strong financial performance. The company exhibits a low P/E ratio of 2, impressive annual net sales growth of 229.14%, and a high return on equity of 83.15%. These metrics highlight effective management, operational efficiency, and a compelling valuation, attracting significant institutional holding.

feed.title: [8-K] Nutex Health Inc. Reports Material Event
feed.summary: Nutex Health Inc. reported a significant increase in profitability for Q1 2026, with net income surging to $46.8 million and diluted EPS to $6.52, despite a modest 2.2% rise in total revenue to $216.5 million. The growth was primarily driven by its hospital division, which saw a 3.1% increase in patient visits, alongside strengthened operating cash flow and a reduction in long-term debt. The company plans to continue its growth strategy with three new hospital openings later in 2026 and is exploring selective self-development of new facilities.

feed.title: Insperity (NYSE:NSP) Updates Q2 2026 Earnings Guidance
feed.summary: Insperity (NYSE:NSP) has updated its Q2 2026 earnings per share guidance to $0.020-$0.500, with full-year 2026 EPS guidance set at $1.600-$2.600. The company recently beat Q1 estimates with $1.31 EPS and $1.90 billion in revenue. Despite a negative P/E ratio and net margin, insiders have shown recent buying activity, and the company offers a quarterly dividend with a 6.8% yield.

feed.title: Annaly Capital (NYSE: NLY) CEO sells 50,000 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Annaly Capital Management CEO David L. Finkelstein sold 50,000 shares of common stock on April 27, 2026, at a weighted average price of $22.88 per share. This sale was conducted under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 plan established on May 16, 2024, for tax and estate planning purposes. Following the transaction, Finkelstein directly holds 783,763 shares, which include dividend equivalent units.

feed.title: Insperity sees 2026 adjusted EPS at $1.60-$2.60 as WSEEs dip
feed.summary: Insperity (NYSE: NSP) reported its first-quarter 2026 financial results, with revenues up 2% to $1.9 billion and diluted EPS at $0.88. The company's average paid worksite employees (WSEEs) decreased by 1% year-over-year. Insperity provided guidance for fiscal year 2026, forecasting adjusted EPS between $1.60 and $2.60 and adjusted EBITDA between $170 million and $230 million, despite an expected decrease in WSEEs.

feed.title: Insperity (NSP) Q1 2026: EPS $0.88 (Miss vs $0.97 Est.), Revenue $1.895B (Beat vs $1.893B Est.) -- Value Opportunity or Possible Value Trap?
feed.summary: Insperity (NSP) reported mixed Q1 2026 results with revenue beating estimates at $1.895 billion, but diluted EPS missing expectations at $0.88. The company is showing early signs of margin recovery despite a decline in WSEEs and increased benefits costs. GuruFocus valuation indicates NSP is currently 63.4% undervalued, with a GF Score of 73/100 and recent insider buying.

feed.title: Insperity (NSP) Q1 2026 results and 2026 profit guidance detailed
feed.summary: Insperity (NSP) reported Q1 2026 revenue of $1.9 billion, a 2% year-over-year increase, but net income and diluted EPS fell by about 35% due to margin pressure and restructuring costs. Despite this, the company offered positive 2026 guidance, expecting adjusted EPS of $1.60–$2.60 and adjusted EBITDA of $170–$230 million, indicating a significant recovery from 2025 levels. Management's strategic efforts, including new contract terms and pricing adjustments, are aimed at sustaining this anticipated profitability improvement.

feed.title: Battery materials maker NOVONIX exits lab unit for $1, keeps 15% stake
feed.summary: NOVONIX has sold its Battery Technology Solutions (BTS) business to former CEO Dr. Chris Burns for $1, retaining a 15% equity stake in the newly formed Dryve Battery Materials. This strategic move aims to refocus NOVONIX's management and capital on building a vertically integrated North American synthetic graphite supply chain. The deal also includes NOVONIX providing transition services and a trademark license until December 31, 2026.

feed.title: Intellia Therapeutics Prices Public Equity Offering to Fund Pipeline
feed.summary: Intellia Therapeutics successfully raised approximately $194.6 million through a public equity offering to fund its pipeline and operations into 2028. The company plans to use these proceeds for clinical development, commercial launch preparation, new candidate research, potential acquisitions, and general corporate purposes. This financial move strengthens Intellia's balance sheet ahead of potential regulatory approval for lonvoguran ziclumeran in 2027.

feed.title: Vanguard holds 2.27M shares in Omnicell (NASDAQ: OMCL)
feed.summary: Vanguard Capital Management has disclosed beneficial ownership of 2,274,766 shares of Omnicell (NASDAQ: OMCL) common stock, representing a 5% stake. This filing, a Schedule 13G, indicates a passive investment rather than an intent to influence the company. Vanguard holds sole dispositive power over all these shares and sole voting power over 340,249 shares.

feed.title: Return on invested capital % of NETSTREIT Corp. – MUN:64N
feed.summary: The article provides financial information for NETSTREIT Corp. (MUN:64N) on the TradingView platform, specifically focusing on its "Return on invested capital %". It lists market data and reference data providers, along with various product and community features available on TradingView. The core content highlights the company's financial metric.

feed.title: NatWest Group PLC (NWG) Stock Up 3.7% but GF Value Says Overvalued -- GF Score: 77/100
feed.summary: NatWest Group PLC (NWG) stock recently rose by 3.7%, but GuruFocus's GF Value indicates it is overvalued, trading 32.4% above its intrinsic value estimate of $12.02. Despite an "Above Average" GF Score of 77/100, driven by a strong Growth rank, the company shows relative weakness in Financial Strength (4/10). There have been no insider transactions in the past three months, suggesting a cautious stance from insiders regarding the current valuation.

feed.title: H.C. Wainwright Maintains Novocure(NVCR.US) With Buy Rating, Cuts Target Price to $48
feed.summary: H.C. Wainwright has reiterated its Buy rating for Novocure (NVCR.US) but has adjusted its target price downwards to $48. This decision reflects the firm's continued positive outlook on the company despite a reduction in the price target.

feed.title: Norwood Financial CEO James Donnelly buys $2,906 in company stock
feed.summary: Norwood Financial Corp. CEO James O. Donnelly purchased 100 shares of company stock for $2,906 on April 29, 2026, increasing his indirect holdings. Despite this insider confidence, the company's stock is considered overvalued according to InvestingPro analysis, even though it boasts a 4.39% dividend yield and has consistently raised dividends for 28 years. This transaction follows a first-quarter 2026 earnings report where Norwood Financial missed analyst expectations for EPS and revenue, and faced increased non-performing loans.

feed.title: Nurix therapeutics CSO Hansen sells $53,497 common stock
feed.summary: Gwenn Hansen, CSO of Nurix Therapeutics (NASDAQ:NRIX), sold 3,214 shares worth $53,497 to cover tax obligations from RSU vesting on April 30, 2026. This was not a discretionary trade, and on the same day, she acquired 8,608 shares through RSU vesting. Analysts remain optimistic about NRIX, with price targets ranging from $23 to $41, reflecting confidence in its oncology pipeline and recent preclinical data presentations.

feed.title: Nurix (NRIX) CSO Hansen converts RSUs, sells 3,214 shares to cover taxes
feed.summary: Nurix Therapeutics' Chief Scientific Officer, Gwenn Hansen, recently converted restricted stock units (RSUs) into 8,608 shares of common stock. On the same day, she sold 3,214 shares at an average price of $16.6453 per share. This sale was not discretionary but rather a "sell to cover" transaction to fulfill tax withholding obligations under the company’s equity incentive plans, leaving her with 120,399 directly held common shares.

feed.title: Nurix (NRIX) CFO nets shares after RSU vesting tax sale
feed.summary: Nurix Therapeutics' CFO, Hans van Houte, reported that 8,608 restricted stock units (RSUs) vested on April 30, 2026. To cover tax withholding obligations associated with this vesting, 2,388 common shares were sold at a weighted average price of $16.6453 per share in a "sell to cover" transaction, which was not a discretionary trade. Following these transactions, van Houte directly holds 51,647 shares of Nurix common stock.

feed.title: Nurix therapeutics CFO Hans van Houte sells $39,748 in shares
feed.summary: Nurix Therapeutics CFO Hans van Houte sold 2,388 shares worth $39,748 to cover tax obligations from vested restricted stock units, not due to discretionary trading. Concurrently, he acquired 8,608 shares through RSU vesting, bringing his total direct holdings to 51,647 shares. Various analysts have reiterated positive ratings and price targets for NRIX, citing upcoming catalysts and clinical progress in chronic lymphocytic leukemia.

feed.title: Total equity of National Health Investors, Inc. – BX:WX6
feed.summary: This article provides financial information for National Health Investors, Inc. (BX:WX6), specifically focusing on its total equity. It notes that the market is closed and displays a period and value for the company's total equity, along with change percentages.

feed.title: The Bank of N.T. Butterfield & Son Limited (NYSE:NTB) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
feed.summary: The Bank of N.T. Butterfield & Son Limited (NYSE: NTB) reported a strong start to 2026 with Q1 net income of $62.6 million and core EPS of $1.55, alongside a core return on average common equity of 24.1%. Key highlights include the acquisition of Rollinson & Hunter in Guernsey, reinforcing its trust business, stable deposit volumes, and a net interest margin increase to 2.75%. The company continues its active capital management through dividends and share repurchases, while maintaining a liquid balance sheet and strong asset quality.

feed.title: Cloudflare (NET) director trades 9,991 shares under Rule 10b5-1 plan
feed.summary: Cloudflare director Carl Ledbetter sold 9,991 shares of Class A Common Stock at a weighted average price of $215.8516 per share. The sale was executed indirectly through the Carl S. Ledbetter Trust under a pre-arranged Rule 10b5-1 trading plan adopted on February 14, 2025. Following the transaction, Ledbetter's trust still holds 928,082 shares, and he directly holds 19,599 shares, indicating this sale represents a small portion of his total holdings.

feed.title: Tania Ortiz Mena Appointed President of Sempra Infrastructure
feed.summary: Tania Ortiz Mena has been appointed as the new president of Sempra Infrastructure, a subsidiary of Sempra. In her new role, Ortiz Mena will oversee the company's clean power, energy networks, and LNG and net-zero solutions business lines. She brings over 23 years of experience within the Sempra family of companies, previously serving as group president of clean power and energy networks at Sempra Infrastructure.

feed.title: Long term debt to total equity ratio of Merck & Co., Inc. Shs Sponsored Canadian Depository Receipt Hedged Reg
feed.summary: The article focuses on the long-term debt to total equity ratio for Merck & Co., Inc. Shs Sponsored Canadian Depository Receipt Hedged Reg S (TSX:MRK). It appears to be a financial data page from TradingView, displaying financial metrics for the company.

feed.title: Teleflex hires Jason Weidman as CEO
feed.summary: Teleflex has appointed Jason Weidman as its new President and CEO, effective June 8, following Liam Kelly's departure. Weidman joins from Medtronic, where he spent two decades and led significant acquisitions and product approvals. His hiring aligns with Teleflex's strategic direction to focus on core interventional, critical care, and high acuity hospital markets after divesting several businesses for $2.03 billion.

feed.title: UBS Group Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for Hilton Worldwide (NYSE:HLT) Stock
feed.summary: UBS Group has increased its price target for Hilton Worldwide (HLT) to $371 from $360, maintaining a "buy" rating and suggesting a 14.23% upside. This follows Hilton beating Q1 earnings estimates with $2.01 EPS and a 9% year-over-year revenue increase, along with providing strong FY2026 guidance. Despite a significant insider stock sale, institutional investors hold a large stake, and the company's Q1 performance and capital returns reinforce positive analyst sentiment for the stock.

feed.summary: This article presents the balance sheet for Constellation Energy Corporation Shs Unsponsored Canadian Depository Receipt Hedged Reg S (NEO:CEGS). As of Q4 2025, the company reported total assets of ‪78.47 billion CAD, a 0.42% increase from Q3 2025, and total liabilities of ‪58.11 billion CAD, up 0.72% in the same period. The financial data provides an overview of the company's current financial position with quarterly figures from Q4 2020 through Q4 2025.

feed.summary: This article displays the operating margin percentage for National Healthcare Properties, Inc. (NHP), listed under the BOATS:NHP ticker on TradingView. It provides a placeholder for period values, changes, and change percentages. The content is primarily a data point presentation from a financial platform.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) Is Up 6.8% After AI-Driven Q3 Beat And Higher 2026 Outlook - Has The Bull Case Changed?
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing (ADP) reported strong Q3 fiscal 2026 results with growth across sales, revenue, net income, and EPS, attributed to its AI-enabled human capital management tools. This performance reinforced an AI-driven productivity narrative and led to a higher full-year outlook. The article discusses how these AI advancements and upgraded guidance impact ADP's investment narrative, with management linking AI tools to productivity gains and margin expansion.

feed.title: Raymond James Onboards Advisors Managing $400 Million From In Lexington, Kentucky
feed.summary: Raymond James has welcomed financial advisors Seth Lawless and Charters “Jay” Osborne, along with their team, to its Lexington, Kentucky office. They will operate as Osborne Lawless and Associates of Raymond James and previously managed approximately $400 million in client assets at Merrill Lynch. The move was influenced by Raymond James' advisor independence model, client-focused culture, and advanced technology for financial planning.

feed.title: Nissan cancels EV production plans at Mississippi plant
feed.summary: Nissan Motor has canceled its plans to produce electric vehicles at its Canton, Mississippi plant, a reversal of a $500 million investment announced in 2022. This decision, influenced by the elimination of federal purchase incentives and slowing EV demand, reflects a broader industry trend of reevaluating EV strategies. Nissan will instead expand production of other vehicle models at the Canton facility, which remains a key manufacturing site for the company in the U.S.

feed.title: Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Estimates By $1.52 EPS
feed.summary: Valero Energy (NYSE:VLO) reported strong quarterly earnings, beating analyst estimates by $1.52 EPS with reported earnings of $4.22 per share against a consensus of $2.70. The company's revenue was $32.38 billion, surpassing expectations and increasing 7.0% year-over-year. This positive performance was attributed to higher refining and renewable diesel margins, a flexible Gulf Coast slate, and a strong financial position, leading to increased price targets from several brokerages.

feed.title: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) Releases Quarterly Earnings Results, Beats Expectations By $0.03 EPS
feed.summary: Merck & Co., Inc. (NYSE:MRK) announced its quarterly earnings, reporting ($1.28) EPS, surpassing consensus estimates by $0.03. The company's revenue reached $16.29 billion, exceeding analyst expectations, and it updated its FY 2026 guidance to 5.040-5.160 EPS. Despite a GAAP loss due to a one-time acquisition charge, Merck highlighted strong performance in oncology and animal health, significant pipeline progress with FDA approvals, and successful new product launches like Keytruda QLEX.

feed.title: INVESTOR ALERT: Pomerantz Law Firm Reminds Investors with Losses on their Investment in Apollo Global Management, Inc. of Class Action Lawsuit and Upcoming Deadlines - APO
feed.summary: Pomerantz LLP has filed a class action lawsuit against Apollo Global Management, Inc. (NYSE: APO) alleging securities fraud or other unlawful business practices. The lawsuit comes after reports from the Financial Times and CNN regarding Apollo executives' discussions with Jeffrey Epstein, which led to significant drops in Apollo's stock price. Investors who purchased Apollo securities during the Class Period have until May 1, 2026, to apply for lead plaintiff.
